appraisal_events.evidence: « Aimé me parut bien choisi… nous disons: “Ce sont de braves gens.” … En ceux-là nous pouvons avoir une confiance absolue. »
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator elevates Aimé by presenting him as competent, loyal, and absolutely trustworthy for the investigation.

status_effects.explanation: He gains in esteem as a reliable and efficient agent, chosen to conduct the investigation.
